# Estalara

> Estalara is a B2B SaaS platform for real estate agencies that enables live property streaming to international buyers, AI-powered multilingual chat, and purchase-intent lead scoring — without requiring agents to use new tools or learn new skills.

> Built by Time2Show, Inc. (Delaware, USA). Targeting real estate agencies in the UK, US, Poland, Spain, and Dubai.

## What Estalara Does

Estalara connects real estate agencies with international buyers through three core capabilities:

1. **Live Property Showcasing** — agents stream live walkthroughs from the property. Buyers from any country watch in real time, ask questions, and receive instant AI translation.
2. **AI Lead Intent Scoring** — after each live session, Estalara ranks every viewer by purchase intent using watch time, questions asked, and engagement intensity.
3. **AI-Powered Multilingual Assistant** — a 24/7 chatbot that knows every property detail and answers buyer questions in their native language.

## Key Statistics

- Average sales cycle reduction: 34 days → 19 days (40% faster)
- Foreign buyers represent up to 40% of premium property sales in key markets
- 100% of homebuyers used the internet during their home search in 2024 (NAR 2024)
- $53.3B in US residential real estate purchased by international buyers (NAR 2024)
